opportunities.title: Senior Full Stack Engineer — New York, NY
opportunities.description: Senior Full Stack Engineer | New York, NY | Onsite | $160k-$210k + equity Rebuilding core marketplace flows (Search -> Booking -> Post-booking) and consolidating fragmented pricing/inventory logic into a clean backend domain. Senior, Staff-leaning: you own pricing/inventory/search, ship end-to-end (UI + API + data model + rollout), mentor engineers, report to Head of Eng. Clear growth path to Staff. Stack: Next.js/React/TypeScript/Tailwind + Ruby on Rails/Node.js + Postgres/MongoDB + AWS/Datadog + Playwright. Need: 4+ yrs production web apps,

opportunities.title: Software Engineer, Platform - Berlin, Germany
opportunities.description:
The mission of Speechify is to make sure that reading is never a barrier to learning.

Over 50 million people use Speechify's text-to-speech products to turn whatever they're reading – PDFs, books, Google Docs, news articles, websites – into audio, so they can read faster, read more, and remember more. Speechify's text-to-speech reading products include its iOS app, Android App, Mac App, Chrome Extension, and Web App. Google recently named Speechify the Chrome Extension of the Year and Apple named Speechify its 2025 Design Award winner for Inclusivity.

opportunities.title: [Hiring] a logo designer $30
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] a logo designer $30

Hi, looking for a person to design a logo for a small business that’s starting up. You will receive a one time payment of 30 USD. It’s going to be a clothing brand. Knowing Arabic is preferred but not necessary. I have a rough draft of what I’d like but want to see what you’d be able to add to it. Message me if interested and we can work it out. Thanks!   submitted by   /u/GintokiMidoriya [link]   [comments]

Job Title: English Language Expert

Job Type: Contract

Location: Remote

Job Summary: In this hourly, remote contractor role, you will review AI-generated English-language responses and/or generate expert language content, evaluating reasoning quality and step-by-step edits while providing precise, actionable feedback.
